name: tripwire
description: Tripwire monorepo root. server/ is the Rust MCP server (built with cargo). plugin/ is the roblox-ts Studio plugin (built with rbxtsc). Each package builds with its own toolchain, so do not run rbxtsc at the root. This is intentionally not an npm-workspaces repo, which keeps the plugin's @rbxts deps local for the node_modules/@rbxts path that Rojo references.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:plugin
